_comment: Model configuration for FinSim. Pass with --model-config models.json.
Each entry is one endpoint; 'count' weights agent assignment across
entries (OASIS round-robins); 'role' (advisory mode) pins a spec to
advisors or clients. Delete the entries you don't use — every entry
listed is constructed at startup. API keys come from environment
variables (defaults per platform; override with api_key_env).

models._note: Bedrock OpenAI-compatible gateway: set BEDROCK_API_BASE_URL and BEDROCK_API_KEY
Native Converse API via standard AWS credentials/region
catch-all for any OpenAI-style API: Groq, Together, OpenRouter, Azure, LM Studio, ...
